query:
-- Find orders that have NO matching items when joined via INNER JOIN products
-- (i.e., orders where product was deleted)
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.totalAmount / 100.0 as total_rupees, o.subtotal / 100.0 as subtotal_rupees, o.createdAt
FROM orders o
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59'
  AND o.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT oi.orderId 
    FROM order_items oi 
    INNER JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
    WHERE oi.orderId = o.id
  );
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute 
-- Find orders that have NO matching items when joined via INNER JOIN products
-- (i.e., orders where product was deleted)
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.totalAmount / 100.0 as total_rupees, o.subtotal / 100.0 as subtotal_rupees, o.createdAt
FROM orders o
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59'
  AND o.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT oi.orderId 
    FROM order_items oi 
    INNER JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id
    WHERE oi.orderId = o.id
  );
